title: helictotrichon hirtifolium
intro: Helictotrichon hirtifolium, also known as Rough Hair Brome, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems, and it is also thought to have antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Helictotrichon hirtifolium is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
